proposed_change.summary: Replace bureau data feed, retrain on a 24-month window, and lower the auto-decline score cutoff.

dimensions.before: Bureau feed A (monthly refresh), 36-month training window
dimensions.after: Bureau feed B (weekly refresh), 24-month training window
GBM v3.2 retrained on new feed, decision cutoff 590

dimensions.before: Auto-decline at 620 with mandatory manual review band 580-620
dimensions.after: Auto-decline at 590 with manual-review band narrowed to 560-590

dimensions.before: Backtest on 2023-2024 vintages; fairness test quarterly
dimensions.after: Backtest refreshed to 2024-2025 vintages; fairness test cadence unchanged

dimensions.before: ECOA/Reg B adverse-action reason codes mapped to the 620 cutoff
dimensions.after: Adverse-action reason-code mapping must be revalidated for the 590 cutoff
